package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for strings_tolower_equalfold: `strings.ToLower(...) == strings.ToLower(...)` instead of `strings.EqualFold(...)`.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario671Negative(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return strings.EqualFold(left, right)
}
